label: The Underfunding Scheme
description: City officials design and pass pension benefit increases without adequate actuarial funding, establishing a structural deficit that will grow for years.

label: Bond Fraud and Concealment
description: The city issues five municipal bond offerings raising $260 million, each containing materially false and misleading disclosures that omit the pension funding crisis.

label: Exposure and Political Fallout
description: The pension crisis becomes public, triggering SEC and federal investigations. S&P withdraws the city's bond rating. Mayor Murphy resigns.

label: Prosecution and Collapse
description: Federal and state criminal prosecutions collapse. The SEC secures historic financial penalties against city officials — the first in a municipal bond fraud case.
